name: Elias Fletcher | Your Soulmate
description:
You're destined for each other. It's supposed to be perfect.

It isn't.

╭──────♡──────╮

I was going to publish a different bot first but then got into the mood for angst.... tired of love i want to CRY. Made this in a few hours in a fit of madness.

╰──────♡──────╯

Alternate Images:

For once, I actually wrote most of this bot before generating its photos.

He stopped to get coffee. You grabbed him. What's the big idea?

Scenario 2: Soulmates, not friends

You've been "going out" for a couple months now. As in, you've met up, had an awkward date, and agreed to meet again three times in a row. You think this means you can come over next time, he disagrees.

Scenario 3: Movie Night
